result:
The file grew from 12,578 to 13,073 lines (~495 lines added). Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## Changes Summary

**Added: Interactive Mandelbrot & Julia Set Fractal Explorer (Shift+Z)**

### New code added to `game_of_life.py`:

1. **`FractalWorld` class** (lines ~4683-4968) ‚Äî The core fractal computation engine with:
   - Mandelbrot and Julia set rendering via escape-time algorithm
   - Pan, zoom (infinite), and iteration depth controls
   - 6 presets: `classic`, `seahorse-valley`, `spiral`, `julia-dendrite`, `julia-rabbit`, `julia-galaxy`
   - 5 color palettes: `classic`, `fire`, `ocean`, `neon`, `grayscale`
   - Toggle between Mandelbrot and Julia mode ‚Äî cursor position becomes the Julia `c` parameter
   - Cursor crosshair display for selecting Julia set points

2. **Integration points** (7 locations wired up):
   - Mode state variables in `App.__init__`
   - `MENU_MODES` entry under new **"Mathematics"** category
   - Keybinding: **Shift+Z** starts fractal mode (replaces brush-grow shortcut)
   - Input dispatch to `_handle_fractal_input`
   - Tick dispatch in main loop (recomputes on dirty flag)
   - Draw dispatch to `_draw_fractal`
   - `_stop_current_mode` for demo tour compatibility

3. **16 color pairs** (180-195) for the fractal palettes

4. **Controls in fractal mode:**
   - Arrow keys / hjkl ‚Äî Pan
   - `+`/`-`/`i`/`o` ‚Äî Zoom in/out
   - `[`/`]` ‚Äî Decrease/increase max iterations
   - Space / `J` ‚Äî Toggle Mandelbrot/Julia (uses cursor position as `c`)
   - `c` ‚Äî Cycle color palettes
   - `p`/`n` ‚Äî Cycle presets
   - `r` ‚Äî Reset view
   - Shift+Z / ESC ‚Äî Exit mode
